message:
refactor(mux-server-impl): modernize statics, reduce enum size, fix clone idioms

Three improvements across the mux-server-impl crate:

1. dispatch.rs: Box the DecodedPdu variant in the Item enum
   (Item::WritePdu(Box<DecodedPdu>)) to reduce the enum's stack size.
   DecodedPdu is a large type and boxing it in the channel-bound enum
   variant avoids inflating the size of all Item variants. Also adds
   clippy::future_not_send and clippy::type_repetition_in_bounds
   suppressions for async trait bounds that trigger false positives.

2. lib.rs: Replace lazy_static! macro with std::sync::LazyLock for the
   PKI static. LazyLock is available in stable Rust and avoids the
   lazy_static dependency for this use site. The semantics are identical
   (initialize-once on first access, panic on init failure).

3. sessionhandler.rs: Replace `self.field = value.clone()` patterns with
   `self.field.clone_from(&value)` for title, working_dir, and
   ssh_auth_sock fields. clone_from() can reuse existing allocations
   (e.g., String buffer capacity) rather than always allocating a new
   string, reducing allocator pressure in the hot path of pane state
   updates. Also adds clippy::future_not_send suppression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
